title: Exoflame Blaze Burners
description: Makes Botania's Exoflame flower affect Create Blaze Burners
body:
Port of the exoflame functionality of [More Create Burners](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-create-burners)

Configurable with Forge Config API Port, but not required.

By default, an exoflame with a steady supply of mana can heat 9 blaze burners to normal heat, or maintain just 1 superheated blaze burner.

You have to feed the blaze burner a blaze cake first to get them superheated, then the exoflame will maintain the heat.
